name: ConstructConnect Pre-Construction Intelligence API
what_it_does: ConstructConnect pre-construction intelligence REST API for construction project leads, bid management, subcontractor invitation to bid, and market intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage construction project lead discovery and filtering for business development pipeline automation, handle bid invitation management and subcontractor ITB distribution for pre-construction workflow, access project document distribution (plans, specs) for automated document delivery, retrieve project data enrichment including owner, GC, architect, and project value for CRM enrichment, manage bid response tracking and award data for competitive intelligence, handle market analytics and construction activity data for business intelligence, access geographic and sector-based project filtering for territory management, retrieve specification data (CSI divisions) for scope-specific subcontractor matching, manage contact and company database for pre-construction relationship management, and integrate ConstructConnect with CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot) and estimating platforms.
use_cases: Discovering project leads from business development agents
Sending bid invitations from pre-construction agents
Tracking bid responses from estimating workflow agents
Analyzing construction market from intelligence agents
not_for: Full project management after award (use Procore or Autodesk)
Payroll and compliance for field workforce
best_when: A general contractor, specialty subcontractor, or construction product manufacturer wanting AI agents to automate project lead discovery, bid invitation distribution, bid response tracking, and competitive market intelligence for pre-construction pipeline management.
avoid_when: PROJECT DATA ACCURACY AND VINTAGE: ConstructConnect project data is sourced from public records, permits, and partner feeds with varying freshness; automated bid decisions based on project value or scope data may act on stale or inaccurate project information; validate critical project data against original owner sources before automated bid commitment. CONTACT DATA CAN-SPAM AND TCPA COMPLIANCE: Automated bid invitation campaigns to contact database must comply with CAN-SPAM commercial email requirements and TCPA for SMS; automated bulk outreach without opt-out compliance creates regulatory exposure. LICENSED CONTRACTOR VERIFICATION: Automated subcontractor ITB distribution should not substitute for license and insurance verification; automated invitation to unlicensed or uninsured subcontractors creates GC prequalification liability. Roper Technologies parent acquisition changes — ConstructConnect is owned by Roper Technologies (NASDAQ: ROP); product strategy and API investment priorities reflect Roper portfolio decisions; verify current API roadmap for any shifts in product focus.

auth.notes: ConstructConnect uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Cincinnati, Ohio HQ. Formed from merger of iSqFt, CMD Group, and Citadon; rebranded to ConstructConnect 2018. Subsidiary of Roper Technologies (NASDAQ: ROP). 650,000+ contractor users. Pre-construction intelligence, bid management, and project data. Competes with Dodge Data & Analytics, Building Connected (Autodesk), and Bid Clerk for pre-construction intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription by market territory and user count
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by geographic market coverage and user seat count; API access in enterprise tier
pricing.notes: Cincinnati OH. Roper Technologies NASDAQ:ROP subsidiary. 650,000+ contractor users. Formed from iSqFt + CMD Group merger. Per-territory and per-seat annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; project search and lead retrieval throttled per subscription tier

known_agent_gotchas: PROJECT DATA FRESHNESS AND ACCURACY: ConstructConnect project leads are sourced from permit records, plan rooms, and partner feeds with variable update frequency; automated bid qualification on stale project data (2-4 week lag) may target projects already awarded or cancelled; implement project last-updated timestamp filter in automated lead scoring

BID INVITATION CONTACT DATABASE CAN-SPAM COMPLIANCE: Automated ITB email campaigns via ConstructConnect contact database must include CAN-SPAM required elements (opt-out link, physical address, sender identification); automated bulk bid invitations without CAN-SPAM compliance create FTC regulatory exposure

iSqFt-to-ConstructConnect API migration: Legacy iSqFt API integrations require migration to ConstructConnect API; verify endpoint domain and authentication schema if migrating from iSqFt integration built before 2018 rebranding

Project scope CSI division data completeness — ConstructConnect project CSI specification data depends on public document availability; automated scope-to-subcontractor matching based on CSI divisions may miss specifications not publicly filed; supplement automated matching with manual project review for high-value bids

Bid response tracking and award data lag — ConstructConnect award and bid result data lags actual construction contract execution by weeks to months; automated competitive intelligence using award data for market share analysis must account for reporting delay

Contact data opt-out and suppression list management — automated bid invitation outreach must maintain and honor contractor opt-out requests; failure to implement suppression list management for repeated unsubscribe requests creates CAN-SPAM violation and reputation risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Pre-construction intelligence. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Project lead and contractor contact data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pre-construction intelligence. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Project data and contractor contact information.
